scripts.lint:custom: node scripts/check-runtime-pins.mjs && node scripts/check-version-pins.mjs && node scripts/check-dependency-policy.mjs && node scripts/check-unused-dependencies.mjs && node scripts/check-package-exports.mjs && node scripts/check-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/check-widget-layers.mjs && node scripts/check-runtime-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/check-outbound-rules.mjs && node scripts/check-test-placement.mjs && node scripts/check-code-quality.mjs && node scripts/check-typescript-rules.mjs && node scripts/check-generated-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/check-governance-fixtures.mjs
scripts.lint: npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:custom
scripts.test:db:local: docker compose -f infra/local/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres && node scripts/wait-for-postgres.mjs && SIDECHAT_TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgres://sidechat:sidechat@localhost:54329/sidechat npm run test:db:integration
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint:eslint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run lint:custom
